privileged_info_summary: The contact_network_rebuild task operates on synthetic EPCRA Tier II chemical facility data from central_vt_facilities.xml, which contains two Vermont facilities: Montpelier Industrial Supply in Washington County and Richmond Processing Plant in Chittenden County. The XML uses the real NOAA National Tier II Data Standard schema (https://cameo.noaa.gov/epcra_tier2/data_standard/v1/). The task requires adding two contacts with specific details: Robert Flanagan (Emergency Response Coordinator, 802-555-0219) to Montpelier as a Facility Emergency Coordinator, and Maria Santos (Plant Safety Officer, 802-555-0347) to Richmond as both Facility Emergency Coordinator and Emergency Contact. These contacts are referenced in the facility notes and certifier fields in the source XML. Phone numbers use the fictional 555 exchange, confirming the data is synthetic but based on real EPCRA Section 312 compliance requirements.
